question: Show the names of customers and names of dishes they order, in descending order of the quantity of dish.
sql: SELECT c.Name, co.Dish_Name FROM customer c JOIN customer_order co ON c.Customer_ID = co.Customer_ID ORDER BY co.Quantity DESC;

back_translation.intent: 获取顾客及其订单信息

semantic.reason: 原始问题未要求显示菜品数量列，但SQL反向翻译描述中包含了co.Quantity作为列，导致结果中多出一列。
